title: GTA Horse Logic
description: Horses smoke when damaged based on health, then explode dramatically. Inspired by how cars behave in GTA.
body:
**Mod Release Trailer**  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Id_xjqmoKLM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## GTA Horse Logic

Make Minecraft horses more interesting. Your horses will give warnings when low on health, but if you let them die, they might take you with them in a fiery explosion.

---

**Gamerule Support**  
Enable or disable features to suit your needs:

- `/gamerule OnlyTamedHorsesExplode [true/false]` → When enabled (default), only player-tamed horses will explode.
- `/gamerule HorseExplosionGriefing [true/false]` → Controls whether explosions damage blocks and create fire.

(For 1.21.11+):
- `/gamerule gta_horse_logic:only_tamed_horses_explode [true/false]`
- `/gamerule gta_horse_logic:horse_explosion_griefing [true/false]`

---

**Horse Behavior**  
Horses now behave more dramatically:

- **50% Health:** Horses emit white puff smoke particles, signaling that they are taking serious damage.  
  ![Horse at 1/2 health.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eced15548c13d02189bf5b34b3757477eb625611.png)

- **25% Health:** Smoke transitions to dark campfire smoke, warning of a critical condition.  
  ![Horse at 1/4 health.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d54e56e41e5bda3a9ceae4f7636285a9068cf41f.png)

- **0% Health:** The horse catches fire and enters a 10-second countdown to an explosion.  
  ![Horse at 0 health.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98a02c08803efe6dec1cb97e78283e5c97e753cc.png)

---

**Owner Notification**  
Tamed horses send a message to their owner when they explode:

- Sends a notification when a tamed horse explodes.  
- Uses the horse’s custom name if it has one.

---

**Mod Compatibility**  
Make the horse explosions even more fun with:
[Block Explosion Damage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-explosion-damage)

![Explosion Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b5529b49c6a4000bdf5658e6b4431b094c48cb6.png)
